meaning: n.(制作女服或童装的)裁缝
examples: He once worked as a dressmaker and made money in a theater.
The dressmaker and the farmer failed because they both tried to erase the line.
Time is a dressmaker, specializing in alterations.
But she was also a skilled dressmaker and made exquisite, ornately detailed clothing for her young daughter.
Parisian power over la mode dates back to Marie Antoinette and her extravagant collaborations with the dressmaker Rose Bertin.
